title: Rich Peppery Italian Kielbasa Amatriciana
description: A hearty Italian dish featuring kielbasa, rich tomato sauce, and a blend of spices, perfect for a crowd-pleasing dinner.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat and saute the sliced kielbasa until browned.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the canned crushed tomatoes, dried basil, black pepper, and red pepper flakes to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the sauce for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Drain the cooked spaghetti and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the sauce and kielbasa.
Season with salt to taste and serve hot, topped with shaved grana padano cheese.
